reason: Avoid duplicating write paths between artifacts and knowledge_artifacts; one canonical postKnowledgeArtifact entry
Change touches shared/api/runner — keep contract consistent across layers
Type definitions live in packages/shared — extending ArtifactKind union + adding KnowledgeMetadataCore
TS quality bar for the new union types and the typed metadata core
API architectural rules — knowledge_artifacts table sits in apps/api
Migration pattern for new knowledge_artifacts table; follow ALTER TABLE / PRAGMA convention in db.ts
promoteToKnowledge() must degrade gracefully without breaking acceptance gate (R18)
Runner-side write path changes (orchestrator + api-client postArtifact call sites)
Acceptance gate hook failure must log + downgrade, not throw — V1 acceptance behavior preserved
V2 architectural reference: §3.1 dual-write, §3.4 structured artifacts, §3.6 entity numbering
